message:
fix: query wisps table for ephemeral MRs and mail messages (#2450)

Two bugs fixed:
1. gt mq list/next and refinery MR queries returned empty because MRs
   are created as wisps but bd list only queries the issues table.
   Added ListMergeRequests() that queries both tables via SQL.
2. gt mail inbox always empty because protocol/lifecycle messages stored
   as wisps were invisible to bd list. Added wisp SQL queries to mailbox.

Also adds InjectFlatForListJSON() to ensure bd v0.59+ list --json calls
include --flat (required for JSON output in tree-format mode). Applied
centrally in beads.run() and all direct exec.Command("bd","list",...) sites.

Fixes the pre-existing bd query colon-parsing bug by replacing
Ephemeral:true (which uses bd query) with ListMergeRequests() (which
uses bd sql directly) for all MR query sites.

Closes #2446, closes #2447

Co-Authored-By: keaganvanzyl <keaganvanzyl@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -97,7 +97,7 @@ if [ -n "$BEADS_DIR" ]; then
 fi
 
 case "$*" in
-  "list --type=convoy --json --all")
+  "list --type=convoy --json --all --flat")
     if [ "$PWD" != "%s" ]; then
       echo "expected town root, got $PWD" >&2
       exit 1

@@ -67,7 +67,7 @@ func findConvoyByDescription(townRoot, beadID string) string {
 	townBeads := filepath.Join(townRoot, ".beads")
 
 	// Query all open convoys from HQ
-	listArgs := beads.MaybePrependAllowStale([]string{"list", "--type=convoy", "--status=open", "--json"})
+	listArgs := beads.MaybePrependAllowStale([]string{"list", "--type=convoy", "--status=open", "--json", "--flat"})
 	listCmd := exec.Command("bd", listArgs...)
 	listCmd.Dir = townBeads

@@ -155,7 +155,7 @@ func ScanStaleHooks(townRoot string, cfg *StaleHookConfig) (*StaleHookScanResult
 
 // listHookedBeads returns all beads with status=hooked.
 func listHookedBeads(townRoot string) ([]*HookedBead, error) {
-	cmd := exec.Command("bd", "list", "--status=hooked", "--json", "--limit=0")
+	cmd := exec.Command("bd", "list", "--status=hooked", "--json", "--flat", "--limit=0")
 	cmd.Dir = townRoot
 
 	output, err := cmd.Output()
